allow: PowerShell(git add app/api/community/ app/cong-dong/page.tsx components/community/ prisma/schema.prisma)
PowerShell(Set-Location d:\\tieuthuyetaudio; npx prisma generate 2>&1; if \($LASTEXITCODE -eq 0\) { Write-Host "generate OK" } else { Write-Host "generate FAILED: $LASTEXITCODE" })
PowerShell(Set-Location d:\\tieuthuyetaudio; npx prisma db push 2>&1; if \($LASTEXITCODE -eq 0\) { Write-Host "db push OK" } else { Write-Host "db push FAILED: $LASTEXITCODE" })

PowerShell(Write-Host "=== DNS servers configured ==="; Get-DnsClientServerAddress -AddressFamily IPv4 | Where-Object { $_.ServerAddresses.Count -gt 0 } | Select-Object InterfaceAlias, ServerAddresses | Format-Table -AutoSize; Write-Host "`n=== nslookup via different DNS ==="; nslookup chatgpt.com 2>&1; nslookup chatgpt.com 8.8.8.8 2>&1; nslookup chatgpt.com 1.1.1.1 2>&1)
